name: destruction-boss-phases
description: Validate staged cracks, collapse chunks, audio, reconstruction, boss phases, and danger-zone telegraph.

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local c=game:GetService("ServerStorage"):WaitForChild("PunchWallAutomation") c:Invoke("Reset") c:Invoke("SetStats",{Power=30,CritChance=0}) c:Invoke("HitWall","Brick Wall") local w=workspace.PunchWallRPG.Walls["Brick Wall"] local cracks=0 for _,d in ipairs(workspace.PunchWallRPG.Polish["Wall Tier Frames"]:GetChildren()) do if string.find(d.Name,"Brick Wall Facade Crack") and d.Transparency<1 then cracks+=1 end end return H:JSONEncode({stage=w:GetAttribute("DamageStage"),hp=w:GetAttribute("HP"),cracks=cracks,sounds=#w:GetChildren()})

local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local c=game:GetService("ServerStorage").PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke("SetStats",{Power=120,CritChance=0}) c:Invoke("HitWall","Brick Wall") local w=workspace.PunchWallRPG.Walls["Brick Wall"] local visible=0 for _,d in ipairs(workspace.PunchWallRPG.Polish["Wall Tier Frames"]:GetChildren()) do if string.find(d.Name,"Brick Wall Collapse Chunk") and d.Transparency<1 then visible+=1 end end return H:JSONEncode({broken=w:GetAttribute("Broken"),hp=w:GetAttribute("HP"),visibleChunks=visible,hasPunch=w:FindFirstChild("Punch Impact")~=nil,hasCollapse=w:FindFirstChild("Building Collapse")~=nil})

local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local w=workspace.PunchWallRPG.Walls["Brick Wall"] local visible=0 for _,d in ipairs(workspace.PunchWallRPG.Polish["Wall Tier Frames"]:GetChildren()) do if string.find(d.Name,"Brick Wall Collapse Chunk") and d.Transparency<1 then visible+=1 end end return H:JSONEncode({broken=w:GetAttribute("Broken"),hp=w:GetAttribute("HP"),visibleChunks=visible})

local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local c=game:GetService("ServerStorage").PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke("SetStats",{WallLevel=20,Power=1000000,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) c:Invoke("HitBoss") c:Invoke("HitBoss") local b=workspace.PunchWallRPG.Walls["Titan Server Wall"] local zone=workspace.PunchWallRPG.Polish["Wall Tier Frames"]:FindFirstChild("Titan Danger Zone") return H:JSONEncode({phase=b:GetAttribute("BossPhase"),participants=b:GetAttribute("ParticipantCount"),weakPoints=b:GetAttribute("WeakPointCount"),dangerZone=zone~=nil,roar=b:FindFirstChild("Boss Roar")~=nil})
